items.title: Critics of Russia Say This Critic Isn’t Critical Enough
items.summary: Alexander Sokurov has questioned the Russian president about government repression, but he is still controversial among his country’s exiles.

items.title: USA beat Australia 2–0 to book knockout spot at World Cup
